title: Open Strings — Names and Sound
description: Play each open string in turn, saying the note name out loud as you pluck. The goal is to connect the physical string to its name and sound.

title: Natural Notes — E String
description: Play every natural note on the E string from open to fret 12, naming each note out loud. Then descend back to open.

title: Octave Shapes
description: Practice the octave shape — two strings up, two frets forward — moving through the natural notes on the E and A strings.

title: Quarter-Note Root Groove
description: Play roots on every quarter note and lock with the kick drum. Four notes per measure, even volume, steady time.

title: Eighth-Note Root Groove
description: Play roots on every eighth note, counting '1-and-2-and-3-and-4-and' out loud. The workhorse rhythm of rock and pop bass.

title: Syncopation Introduction — The Anticipated Downbeat
description: Play a simple syncopated pattern where beat 3 is anticipated — the note lands on the 'and of 2'. Foundation of funk and R&B feel.

title: Intervals on One String
description: Play the root and each interval above it on the same string, naming the interval out loud.

title: Perfect Fifth Shapes
description: Practice the perfect fifth shape across all string pairs, moving through common root notes. The foundation of root-fifth bass lines.
